description: Test cases where question is related to context topic but specific answer is not available

cases.query: What was the company's net profit margin in 2023?
contexts: The company reported strong revenue growth of 15% year-over-year, driven by expansion into Asian markets.
Our product portfolio includes enterprise software solutions and cloud infrastructure services.
cases.description: Financial metric question when only revenue mentioned
cases.rationale: Context discusses revenue but not profit margins - should not guess or extrapolate

cases.query: What is the maximum dosage of this medication for children under 12?
contexts: This medication is approved for treating mild to moderate pain in adults. The recommended adult dosage is 500mg every 6 hours.
Side effects may include drowsiness and upset stomach. Consult your doctor if symptoms persist.
cases.description: Pediatric dosage when only adult dosage available
cases.rationale: Context only covers adult dosage - pediatric dosing requires specific information that isn't provided

cases.query: What programming languages does the API support besides Python?
contexts: Our API provides comprehensive Python SDK support with full documentation and code examples.
The API uses RESTful endpoints and supports OAuth 2.0 authentication.
cases.description: Question about other languages when only Python documented
cases.rationale: Context only mentions Python support - should not assume other language availability

cases.query: What is the return policy for international orders?
contexts: All domestic orders can be returned within 30 days for a full refund. Items must be unused and in original packaging.
Free shipping is available on orders over $50 within the continental United States.
cases.description: International policy when only domestic policy stated
cases.rationale: Context only covers domestic returns - international policies may differ and aren't specified

cases.query: What are the system requirements for running this on Linux?
contexts: Windows 10 or later is required. Minimum 8GB RAM and 20GB free disk space recommended.
The software requires .NET Framework 4.8 and Visual C++ Redistributable 2019.
cases.description: Linux requirements when only Windows documented
cases.rationale: Context only covers Windows requirements - Linux compatibility and requirements not mentioned
